meta.listDescription: Manage the session and package refund policy families.
meta.detailDescription: Review versions, edit drafts, publish new versions, and archive old drafts.
meta.invalidDescription: The requested refund policy type is not valid.

page.title: Refund policies
page.description: Refund policies for sessions and packages are managed from here.

overview.title: Refund policies
overview.note: Manage the session and package policies from two clear cards.

session.title: Session refund policy
session.description: Shown to the patient when paying for a normal session.

package.title: Package refund policy
package.description: Shown to the patient when paying for a package.

notice.heading: Governance boundary
notice.note: Publishing a new version affects future payments only and does not change historical acceptances.

session.title: Session refund policy
session.description: Controls the refund policy shown during normal session checkout.

package.title: Package refund policy
package.description: Controls the refund policy shown during package purchase checkout.

actions.createDraftError: Could not create a draft right now.

error.heading: Refund policies are not available right now

empty.heading: No refund policy families found
empty.note: The backend returned no refund policy families.

loading.title: Loading refund policy
loading.note: We are loading the current version and version history.

notFound.heading: Refund policy version was not found
notFound.note: We could not find the requested refund policy version.

detail.description: This policy is shown to the patient before payment is completed.

notice.heading: Publishing guidance
notice.note: Publishing a new version affects future payments only and does not change historical acceptances.

summary.draftCountHint: Draft versions that can still be edited
summary.updatedAtHint: When the policy was last changed

notFound.heading: Policy not found
notFound.note: We could not load the requested refund policy.

preview.toggleNote: Switch between editing and the patient view.

sections.policyInfoNote: Update the title and status only.
sections.clausesNote: Each clause should be short and easy to read.

clauses.heading: Clauses
clauses.note: Keep each clause short and clear.

empty.note: No clauses have been added yet.

preview.heading: Patient preview
preview.note: This is the version the patient reads at checkout.

active.note: This is the current policy shown to patients at checkout.

empty.title: No active policy is published yet
empty.note: Create a draft and publish it to make this policy active.

empty.title: No drafts yet
empty.note: Create a draft to start editing a new version.

feedback.publishError: Could not publish the draft right now.
feedback.archiveError: Could not archive the draft right now.

history.heading: Policy versions
history.note: Select a version to inspect its content and status.

empty.title: No historical versions yet
empty.note: Published and archived versions will appear here.

version.description: Inspect a single policy version, or edit it if it is still a draft.

warnings.readOnlyTitle: Active and archived versions are immutable
warnings.readOnlyNote: Only drafts can be edited. Published versions stay read-only for historical integrity.
warnings.publishNote: The current draft can be published after validation. Historical acceptances are not changed by publishing.

session.fullRefund: If the request is made 48 hours or more before the session: full refund.
session.refund75: If the request is made between 24 and 48 hours before the session: 75% refund.
session.refund50: If the request is made between 12 and 24 hours before the session: 50% refund.
session.reviewBefore12: If the request is made less than 12 hours before the session: review and activate policy.
session.reviewAfterStart: After the session starts or if the patient does not show up: review and activate policy.
session.fullRefundEn: If the request is made 48 hours or more before the session: full refund.
session.refund75En: If the request is made between 24 and 48 hours before the session: 75% refund.
session.refund50En: If the request is made between 12 and 24 hours before the session: 50% refund.
session.reviewBefore12En: If the request is made less than 12 hours before the session: needs approval.
session.reviewAfterStartEn: After the session starts or if the patient does not show up: needs approval.

package.completedNoRefund: A completed session is not refundable.
package.fullRefund: If the session is more than 48 hours away: full refund for the unused session.
package.refund75: If the session is between 24 and 48 hours away: 75% refund.
package.refund50: If the session is between 12 and 24 hours away: 50% refund.
package.reviewBefore12: If the session is less than 12 hours away: review and activate policy.
package.reviewAfterStart: After the session starts or if the patient does not show up: review and activate policy.
package.completedNoRefundEn: A completed session is not refundable.
package.fullRefundEn: If the session is more than 48 hours away: full refund for the unused session.
package.refund75En: If the session is between 24 and 48 hours away: 75% refund.
package.refund50En: If the session is between 12 and 24 hours away: 50% refund.
package.reviewBefore12En: If the session is less than 12 hours away: needs approval.
package.reviewAfterStartEn: After the session starts or if the patient does not show up: needs approval.

editor.heading: Edit policy content
editor.noteDraft: You can edit this draft, preview it, publish it, or archive it.
editor.noteReadOnly: This version is read-only because it has already been published or archived.

sections.basicInformationNote: Enter the Arabic and English titles and summaries first.
sections.clausesHelp: Review clauses as a structured list, then open a row to edit it in a modal.
sections.rulesHelp: Review each rule as a row, then edit the item you need in a modal.
sections.reviewAndPublishNote: Check the preview carefully before publishing a new version.

fields.clauseActiveNote: Inactive clauses stay in the draft for reference but are hidden from the active policy document.
fields.requiresAdminOverrideNote: Use this when the rule should be handled manually by operations.

clausesEmpty.title: No clauses yet
clausesEmpty.note: Add clauses to build the readable policy document.

rulesEmpty.title: No rules yet
rulesEmpty.note: Add rules to define refund behavior.

modals.clauseDescription: Edit the clause content for the selected policy language.
modals.ruleDescription: Edit the rule fields without using raw JSON.
modals.deleteDescription: This action removes the item from the draft only.
modals.deleteClauseWarning: This clause will be removed from the draft.
modals.deleteRuleWarning: This rule will be removed from the draft.
modals.deleteNote: You can add it again later if needed.

clauses.itemNote: Keep the clause text readable in both languages.

rules.itemNote: Use the structured rule fields instead of raw JSON.

advanced.title: Advanced JSON preview
advanced.hiddenNote: The advanced JSON view is hidden by default. The main editor uses structured fields instead.
advanced.contentNote: This area mirrors the draft content for power users and debugging only.

preview.heading: How patients will see this policy
preview.note: The preview reflects the values entered in the structured editor.
preview.title: Title

validation.fixErrors: Please fix the validation errors before continuing.
validation.invalidArray: {field} must be a valid JSON array.
validation.clausesRequired: At least one clause is required.
validation.rulesRequired: At least one rule is required.
validation.invalidClause: One or more clauses are invalid.
validation.invalidRule: One or more rules are invalid.
validation.invalidRefundPercent: Refund percent must be between 0 and 100.
validation.invalidRefundMode: {field} must be NONE when cancellation is blocked.
validation.clauseCodeRequired: Clause code is required for item #{index}.
validation.clauseSortOrderInvalid: Clause sort order is invalid for item #{index}.
validation.clauseHeadingRequired: Clause heading is required for item #{index}.
validation.clauseBodyRequired: Clause body is required for item #{index}.
validation.ruleSortOrderInvalid: Rule sort order is invalid for item #{index}.
validation.triggerTypeRequired: Trigger type is required for item #{index}.
validation.refundModeRequired: Refund mode is required for item #{index}.

feedback.saveError: Could not save the draft right now.
feedback.publishError: Could not publish the draft right now.
feedback.archiveError: Could not archive the draft right now.
feedback.policySaveError: Could not save the policy right now.
feedback.clauseSaveError: Could not save the clause right now.
feedback.clauseDeleteError: Could not delete the clause right now.
feedback.reorderError: Could not reorder clauses right now.

publish.title: Publish this draft?
publish.note: Review the draft carefully before publishing it.
publish.warningTitle: Publishing this version affects future payments only and does not change historical acceptances.
publish.warningBody: Publishing makes this version active and archives the previous active version.

archive.title: Archive this draft?
archive.note: Archiving removes the draft from edit flow but keeps the history intact.
archive.warningBody: Archiving does not delete history or affect existing acceptances.

confirm.publishNote: Review the draft carefully before publishing it.
confirm.publishWarningTitle: Publishing this version affects future payments only and does not change historical acceptances.
confirm.publishWarningBody: Publishing makes this version active and archives the previous active version.
confirm.archiveNote: Archiving removes the draft from edit flow but keeps the history intact.
confirm.archiveWarningBody: Archiving does not delete history or affect existing acceptances.
